prompt.task: Review the provided code and generate structured feedback.
prompt.context: This code review is part of an automated CI/CD pipeline. The output will be parsed by tooling that posts comments directly to pull requests. Consistency in format is critical for the parsing to work correctly.

constraints.constraint: Only flag issues you are confident about.
Do not suggest stylistic changes unless they affect readability significantly.
Security issues must always be flagged, even if minor.

output_contract.format: Return valid JSON matching the schema below. No markdown fences, no explanation outside the JSON.

constraints_on_output.constraint: Issues array must be sorted by severity (critical first).
Each issue must have a unique id within this review.
Line numbers must be valid (within the provided code range).
If no issues found, return empty issues array, not null.
Always include at least one positive observation if code is not entirely broken.
